# revokeSession

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for revokeSession

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useRevokeSessionMutation(); mutate({ input: { sessionId: '<UUID>' } });
```

## Examples

### Use useRevokeSessionMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useRevokeSessionMutation();
mutate({ input: { sessionId: '<UUID>' } });
```
